---
title: "Homework11"
author: "HudsonPlaskoff"
date: "2026-04-18"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(nycflights13)
```

## Origin and Destination Pairs^[Question 1 complete]

```{r}
pairs <- flights %>%
  group_by(origin,dest) %>%
  summarize(
    n = n()
  )

knitr::kable(pairs %>% head())
```

## Latitudes and Longitudes of Origin Airports^[Question 2 complete]

```{r}
pairs <- pairs %>%
  left_join(airports, join_by(origin==faa)) %>%
  select(origin,dest,n,lon,lat) %>%
  rename(
    origin_lon = lon,
    origin_lat = lat
  ) %>%
  relocate(origin_lon, origin_lat, .before=dest)

knitr::kable(pairs %>% head())
```

## Latitudes and Longitudes of Destination Airports^[Question 3 complete]

```{r}
pairs <- pairs %>%
  left_join(airports, join_by(dest==faa)) %>%
  select(origin,origin_lon,origin_lat,dest,n,lon,lat) %>%
  rename(
    dest_lon = lon,
    dest_lat = lat
  ) %>%
  relocate(dest_lon, dest_lat, .before=n)

knitr::kable(pairs %>% head())
```
